TABLE II THE RECALL AND F1-SCORES OF DIFFERENT METHODS ON THE VG-150 TEST SET.

Fig. 2. Overview of the enhanced multimodal RAG-LLM framework for visual question answering, comprising three core components: (1) Multimodal RAG Construction enabling structured visual encoding through knowledge graph generation, (2) Semantic-Enhanced Prompt Generation for cross-modal context alignment, and (3) LLM-Based VQA Engine integrating domain knowledge for response synthesis with visual grounding.

Fig. 1. The qualitative comparison on challenging aerial VQA examples. Existing MLLMs often miss small objects or confuse counts and spatial relations, whereas our proposed multimodal RAG framework provides more accurate and visually grounded answers.
